invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格突破前高$2180且RSI持续上升，或融资费率Z-score降至50%以下。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: Price breaks above previous high $2180 with RSI continuing to rise, or funding rate Z-score drops below 50%.

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格突破前高$73000且RSI持续上升，或融资费率Z-score降至100%以下。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: Price breaks above previous high $73000 with RSI continuing to rise, or funding rate Z-score drops below 100%.
